mapper.insert:
SELECT LAST_INSERT_ID() AS id
insert into collect_paper
`uuid`, `project_id`, `title`, `type`, `status`, `create_by`, `deadline`, `expires`, `is_delete`
#{uuid,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{projectId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{title,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{type,jdbcType=SMALLINT}, #{status,jdbcType=SMALLINT}, #{createBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{deadline,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{expires, jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{isDelete, jdbcType=SMALLINT}
mapper.select:
select count(id) from collect_paper where project_id = #{projectId} and create_by = #{username} and is_delete=0
and title like #{pattern}
